# phare_uptime_monitors (Data Source)

Fetches a list of uptime monitors.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "phare_uptime_monitors" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `project_scope` (Dynamic) Optional. Project scope for this data source. Accepts either a numeric project ID (e.g., 123) or a string project slug (e.g., "my-project"). Overrides the provider-level project_scope if set. Required when using an organization-scoped API key (starting with pha_org_).

### Read-Only

- `monitors` (Attributes List) List of uptime monitors (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--monitors))

<a id="nestedatt--monitors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `monitors`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp
- `id` (Number) Monitor ID
- `interval` (Number) Monitoring interval in seconds
- `name` (String) Monitor name
- `paused` (Boolean) Whether the monitor is paused
- `project_id` (Number) Parent project ID
- `protocol` (String) Monitoring protocol
- `regions` (List of String) Regions where monitoring is performed
- `status` (String) Monitor status
- `timeout` (Number) Monitoring timeout in milliseconds
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp
- `url` (String) URL being monitored (for HTTP/HTTPS)
